# Code of Conduct

This project is maintained as a public open-source PHP library.

All public interactions in this repository should stay technical, factual, and relevant to the project.

Bug reports and feature requests should include useful technical information, especially reproduction steps when applicable.

Off-topic comments, spam, personal attacks, harassment, threats, or publishing private information are not accepted.

The maintainer may close, hide, delete, or lock issues and comments that violate this Code of Conduct.

Repeated or severe violations may result in blocking the user from further interaction with the repository.
